name: Linear QBR
tagline: Pale pink quarterly review deck with strict navy frames, editorial serif headings, olive accents, and linear report modules.

palette.description: pale pink field with navy linear borders, large blue serif headings, olive-gold accent words, and muted olive body text

typography.style: high-contrast editorial serif headings with neutral readable body text

best_for: Quarterly business reviews, executive operating updates, and reporting decks that need a formal but not overly corporate tone.
avoid_for: Playful training, dark product pitches, or image-heavy portfolios where strict frames and pale report styling would feel too restrained.

source_inspiration.name: Slidesgo Linear Quarterly Business Review
source_inspiration.notes: Independent HTML/CSS reconstruction of the public preview sequence. It follows the source typography, pale background, navy frame rules, olive accent marks, and report-like layout rhythm without reusing source presentation assets.
